productDisplayName: Puma Men Basics Black Casual Shoes
description: puma has its roots in Germany, and the brand is known for its minimalist design in high-end athletic footwear. Crafted in the brand's signature style, these puma G.Vilas 2 basics shoes are the right solution for brand conscious comfort junkies. These shoes are great for regular wear as they ensure superior traction and protection to the feet, without compromising on comfort and style.UpperSynthetic upper with high top stylingSynthetic twill tape lacesComfort insole with padded tongue to ensure a snug, comfortable FitLining for added comfortLeather mud guard and a heel bumperMidsolePU midsole with double foxingOutsoleTextured rubber outsoleshoe careRub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
